title: T-098 — Schema Diff Viewer screen (SET-032)
prompt:
# T-098 — Schema Diff Viewer screen (SET-032)

## Goal
SET-032 Schema Diff Viewer production component (spec-driven; no exact prototype).

Spec-driven UI: no exact canonical prototype exists under `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/*.jsx` for this screen. `prototypes/design/02-SETTINGS-UX.md SET-032 / schema-diff` replaces prototype parity as the authoritative UI contract. Reuse read-only diff/code-panel patterns from rule/schema admin screens where available; do not implement RuleDetailScreen as the schema diff screen. Any prototype snippets are element/pattern references only, not 1:1 screen sources. Production contract: data via Server Components (Drizzle); mutations via Server Actions; primitives from `packages/ui` only.

## Files in scope
- apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/schema/diff/[id]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/schema/diff/[id]/page.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria (all must hold)
- Given the production page renders, it MUST satisfy `prototypes/design/02-SETTINGS-UX.md SET-032 / schema-diff` as the source of truth. UX spec replaces prototype parity for this task; no wrong/adjacent prototype may be used as a 1:1 source. Reused prototype elements must be limited to matching primitives/patterns and must not change the screen semantics, routes, fields, or states required by the UX spec.
- Given a column with 3 versions, when diff for v2 vs v3 is requested, then JSON deep-diff is rendered in unified view with added/removed/changed badges.
- Given there is no prior version, when v1 is selected, then the diff panel shows 'No prior version' empty state.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: write RTL test that mounts the page with mocked data and asserts the parity AC items + ac_extra coverage.
- GREEN: build component, wire Server Action(s).
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/schema/diff/[id]/page.test.tsx [create]` and `pnpm typecheck`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not import @radix-ui/react-dialog outside packages/ui (§0 ESLint rule).
- Do not paste prototype JSX wholesale — translate to production contract.
- Do not regress accessibility (axe violations = fail).
- Do not claim 1:1 prototype parity for this screen; exact prototype is missing and UX spec is authoritative.
